when_to_use: Accepting PIX, boleto, and cards via unified Brazil payments API
Automated invoicing and payment reminders for Brazilian SMBs
Recurring charge management for subscription businesses in Brazil

review.verdict: One of the cleanest Brazilian payment APIs for SMBs combining Pix, boleto, and invoicing in one place.
review.best_for: Brazilian SaaS and SMB merchants needing Pix, boleto, and invoicing together
review.not_for: Companies outside Brazil or needing multi-country LatAm coverage
